task: Using the supplied climate finance packet only, compute 5-year net abatement cost (net of opex savings) per tCO2e for Measures A, B, and C; produce a MACC_curve.xlsx spreadsheet and a memo.md that include all intermediate calculations, explicit assumptions, exceptions, exact row/value citations to the supplied packet, uncertainty/sensitivity notes, validation checks, and a final decision table that ties every recommendation back to the supplied values. Do not invent additional records; mark missing inputs as needs_review. No external data lookup beyond interpreting the stated public-removed context.
